==============================================================================================================================================================

Seminar Socratic #6

30 Aug 2025 Link to Meetup

Location

The event will be hosted at SOROC:

Old Zogbo Bakey Building | ZOGBO, Cotonou | Map

Announcements

We are delighted to invite you to this month’s BitDevs Meetup in Cotonou!

Last month, we explored the different developer programs offered by Btrust and Bitshala, along with an introductory workshop on BTCPay Server to understand the basics of its use.

This month, we are going even further.

We will connect our BTCPay Server instance to a web application and perform live Bitcoin payments together.

This will be the perfect opportunity to:

  • Deepen your practical knowledge of Bitcoin payment integration

  • Network with other developers, entrepreneurs, and enthusiasts

  • Ask your questions and actively participate in technical discussions

Don’t miss out on this opportunity!

Reserve your spot now and join the local BitDevs community for a session full of learning and hands-on practice.

We warmly thank our sponsor Btrust for supporting the growth of Bitcoin Developers Community in Benin.

Reminders

  • We prefer no photos and no videos during the event
  • Chatham House Rule
  • Leave the meeting space as clean as you found it
  • Suggest topics for the next Socratic Seminar! Where to find topics?

Topics

We will discuss and experiment with the topics below:

MC: Loïc

  • Bitdevs Cotnou

News – Some updates on Bitcoin Development

MC: AL

  • Bitcoin Optech
  • Breez Tech

Workshop : Advanced BTCPay Server for Applications

MC: Ramane

  • BTCPay Server
  • BTCPay Server Docs
  • Phoenixd
  • Blink API

Upcoming Events & Announcements

MC: Wilfried

  • Next Meetups and Annoucements
